title: KUK UG and Integrated Course Admission Form 2026, Notification & Apply Online -
how_to_apply: Eligible/Interested candidates can apply using the link given below. Visit the official website https://kuk.ac.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position.
